tools.name: now_in
tools.description: Current local time in an IANA timezone, with UTC offset, abbreviation and DST flag. Use whenever you need to know 'now'.

tools.name: convert_timezone
tools.description: Convert a date/time from one IANA timezone to another. Accepts ISO 8601 or natural language ('next Tuesday 3pm'). Returns converted datetime, offset, abbreviation and DST flag.

tools.name: convert_batch
tools.description: Like convert_timezone but converts a single instant into many target timezones at once. Ideal for world-clock views.

tools.name: tz_offset
tools.description: Exact UTC offset of a timezone at a given instant (DST-aware). Handles fractional offsets like India +05:30 and Nepal +05:45.

tools.name: list_timezones
tools.description: List or search valid IANA timezone names. Filter by city, region or country substring (e.g. 'kolkata', 'america').

tools.name: lookup_timezone
tools.description: Resolve a city or country name to its IANA timezone(s), so you don't need the exact identifier. E.g. 'Delhi' -> Asia/Kolkata.

tools.name: date_math
tools.description: Add/subtract time to a date respecting DST (days are calendar-based, hours/minutes are absolute), or compute the difference between two datetimes in different zones.

tools.name: find_meeting_slots
tools.description: Suggest overlapping working-hour slots for a meeting across timezones (excludes weekends and, if a country code is given per participant, public holidays). FREE TIER: returns at most 1 slot; get ALL matching slots via the paid endpoint (see 'upgrade' in the response).

tools.name: is_holiday
tools.description: Check whether a date is a public holiday in a country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). Data from the free Nager.Date service.
